content:
graph TD
    IF[Intermittent Fasting in Special Populations]
    IF --> T2D[Type 2 Diabetes: modest HbA1c/glucose/weight reductions; hypoglycemia risk on sulfonylureas/insulin]
    IF --> PCOS[PCOS: insulin sensitivity, androgens, menses; small short trials]
    IF --> MetS[Metabolic Syndrome: parallels continuous caloric restriction]
    IF --> ATH[Athletes: lean mass/performance preserved if energy/protein adequate]
    IF --> OLD[Older Adults: sarcopenia, polypharmacy, fracture risk; sparse data]
    IF --> RAM[Ramadan Fasting: tolerable in healthy; risk in pregnancy, CKD, diabetes, heat]
    IF --> BAR[Post-Bariatric: not robustly studied; protein/micronutrient concerns]
